name: Optimal BST (Knuth's Algorithm)
description: Find the binary search tree with minimum expected search cost given key frequencies, using Knuth's O(n³) DP.
intuition: dp[i][j] = min expected cost for BST containing keys i..j. Try each key k as root: cost = dp[i][k-1] + dp[k+1][j] + sum_of_weights[i..j]. Knuth's optimization limits k search range to O(1) amortized.
